sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BioNTech Impfung: Post-Pandemic Pivot Challenges Biotech Resilience
feed.summary: BioNTech, the company behind the COVID-19 vaccine Comirnaty, is facing a significant revenue decline as demand for its vaccine fades after the pandemic. The company is now pivoting strategically towards oncology, investing heavily in personalized mRNA-based cancer therapies to sustain growth and leverage its mRNA platform. While BioNTech possesses a strong balance sheet and a deep pipeline, it faces fierce competition in the oncology space and potential risks from clinical trial failures and regulatory hurdles.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Inc. stock (US8581191009): Is its recycling edge strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. (SDI) thrives on an efficient, scrap-based electric arc furnace (EAF) production model, turning recycled metal into steel for high-demand U.S. construction and automotive sectors. This strategy results in lower operating costs and a resilient business model, appealing to investors seeking exposure to domestic demand and sustainability trends. The company's vertical integration, strategic mini-mill locations, and focus on operational discipline position it as a strong competitor with significant potential for capturing market share and benefiting from infrastructure spending.

feed.title: Cadence and Google Partner to Scale AI-driven Chip Design
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems is collaborating with Google to optimize its ChipStack AI Super Agent with Gemini on Google Cloud, aiming to revolutionize chip design and verification through AI-driven automation. This partnership intends to accelerate next-generation chip development by integrating advanced agentic reasoning with Cadence’s EDA solutions, promising up to 10X productivity improvements and quicker time to tapeout. The collaboration will leverage Google Cloud's secure infrastructure to deliver an end-to-end solution for agent-powered chip design.

feed.title: Leapmotor's new EV puts cockpit and driver aids on one controller
feed.summary: BlackBerry's QNX division has announced that its QNX SDP 8.0 and QNX Hypervisor for Safety 8.0 will be the foundational software for Leapmotor's D19 premium electric SUV, with mass production starting in April 2026. This vehicle will be the first global production model to use a centralized controller to consolidate digital cockpit, ADAS, and connectivity, supporting extensive displays, audio channels, and camera streams. The D19 builds on an existing partnership, showcasing QNX's continued expansion in the automotive sector for advanced, safety-critical systems.
